title: Scribbly Library Submission Metadata (meta.yaml) v1
description: Author-supplied metadata that accompanies a .scribblylib submission. Sits alongside library.scribblylib in submissions/<github-handle>/<library-slug>/. Validated in CI by validate.ts.

description.description: One or two sentence summary of what the library contains and who it is for. English only.

version.description: Strict semver MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH. Must increase on every published update to the same slug.

handle.description: GitHub handle of the submitter. Lowercased; must match the directory name under submissions/.

license.description: SPDX identifier. Restricted to the marketplace allowlist.

tags.description: Controlled tag vocabulary. Adding a new tag requires a separate PR that updates this schema and CONTRIBUTING.md.

previewItemId.description: Optional. The id of the libraryItem to render as the gallery card thumbnail. Defaults to the first item when omitted.

deprecated.description: Marks the library as superseded. Gallery hides deprecated libraries from default browse but keeps them installable by direct link.
